Questions 11–15 What is the main attraction in each of the following areas of the festival? Choose FIVE correct answers, A-G , next to questions 11-15 .

Attractions

B live music

D a children's playground

E evening entertainment

F a competition for adults

G vegetable market

Questions 16–20

Choose the correct answer.

Denford Festival

16 What does Sam say about the festival tickets?

1. They allow you to get into all the festival events.
2. They are more expensive to buy on the day.
3. They have nearly all been sold.

17 On the last night of the festival, visitors will be able to

1. take part in a dance.
2. go to a theatre performance.
3. watch some fireworks.

18 What will be provided for international visitors?

1. discounts on accommodation.
2. tours of the local area.
3. a guide written in different languages.

19 What information is given about car park A?

1. It is bigger than car park B.
2. It is closer to town than car park B.
3. It will close earlier than car park B.

20 What change have the organisers made to the programme this year?

1. replacing the programme with an app
2. reducing the number of programmes printed
3. introducing a charge for the programmes

question_groups.prompt_html:
Questions 31–33

Choose the correct answer.

31 What impact does Marc Prensky believe that digital technology has had on young people?

1. It has altered their thinking patterns.
2. It has harmed their physical development.
3. It has limited their brain capacity.

32 Digital immigrants tend to access computers

1. using their native language.
2. less efficiently than young people.
3. for less important information.

33 What example is given of having a 'digital accent'?

1. having less effective typing skills
2. doing things the old-fashioned way
3. being unable to understand instructions

items.prompt_html: 31 What impact does Marc Prensky believe that digital technology has had on young people?
32 Digital immigrants tend to access computers
33 What example is given of having a 'digital accent'?

question_groups.instruction: Which theorist makes each of the following points? Choose the correct letter, **A** , **B** or **C** , next to questions **34-40** .
question_groups.prompt_html:
Questions 34–40

Which theorist makes each of the following points?

Choose the correct letter, A , B or C , next to questions 34-40 .

Theorists

A Allen

B James

C Vander

Points made

34 Current teaching methods don't work.

35 Many students don't understand computers.

36 Computer technology doesn't interest all students.

37 Students can still learn the traditional way.

38 Students still need to learn research skills.

39 We should use computer games to teach.

40 Computers can't replace educators.
